Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I've been coming here a bunch lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}This is where Chidori and I first met.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What're you doing here, Fuuka?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, I went home for a bit. I've been going back a lot recently.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You know, you've really changed, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You're a totally different person from when you first showed up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Honestly, you were kind of a wimp before, but now... you're somethin' else. I can't even describe it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You've changed too, Junpei-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Yuka-tan said the exact same thing, but I just don't see it myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}I mean, just the other day, I was freakin' out and throwin' all that blame around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Man, I was so damn scared. I just couldn't keep my shit together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I hate to admit it, but even now, I can't help bein' scared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Yuka-tan said the exact same thing, but I just don't see it myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}I mean, just the other day, I got all scared and freaked out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}But really, I was afraid. And I'm still afraid, to be honest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}But I've been thinking about it, and I don't wanna sit around doin' nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}If I forget everything, that means I'd forget Chidori, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}I wouldn't even be alive right now if it wasn't for her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You're only scared because you're choosing not to run away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}We all feel that way. It's nothing to be ashamed of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}That's why I want to protect everyone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}After all, the Dark Hour is horrifying to think about, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}But our Personas awakened, and we're here now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}The future hasn't been written in stone yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}And I want to be true to myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}You're really somethin', Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
